description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The exterior walls are finished in light gray brick, and the house features large, white-framed windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The front yard is landscaped with a manicured lawn, stepping stones leading to the entrance, and several mature trees providing shade and privacy. The driveway is positioned to the left of the main entrance, leading up to the house. The backyard and side areas are partially obscured by dense foliage, but the open-plan interior layout is visible through the windows and cutaway walls. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, light gray brick exterior, large windows, and a landscaped yard with mature trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, stepping stones, and two large trees framing the house.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by dense tree foliage, partially obscuring the house's left side and showing the flat roofline.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the open-plan interior layout, large windows, and the back garden area with visible trees.
description_view_3: Angled view highlighting the front yard, driveway, main entrance, and the integration of the house with surrounding trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no porch, accessed by stepping stones, and framed by landscaping and mature trees.
